mapper.sql: SELECT sa.id, sa.user_id, u.username, COALESCE(sp.display_name, u.full_name) AS display_name, u.profile_picture_url AS user_photo, COALESCE(sp.is_verified, FALSE) AS is_verified, sa.activity_type, sa.entity_type, sa.entity_id, sa.entity_slug, sa.entity_title, sa.entity_cover, sa.metadata, sa.like_count, sa.comment_count, sa.created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social_activities (user_id, activity_type, entity_type, entity_id, entity_slug, entity_title, entity_cover, metadata, visibility, like_count, comment_count, is_active, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{activityType}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{entitySlug}, #{entityTitle}, #{entityCover}, #{metadata, typeHandler=com.masasilam.app.typehandler.JsonMapTypeHandler}, #{visibility}, 0, 0, TRUE, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE social_activities SET is_active = FALSE WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: , CASE WHEN #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM activity_likes al WHERE al.activity_id = sa.id AND al.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) ELSE FALSE END AS is_liked_by_me FROM social_activities sa JOIN users u ON u.id = sa.user_id LEFT JOIN user_social_profiles sp ON sp.user_id = sa.user_id WHERE sa.user_id IN ( SELECT following_id FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ) AND sa.is_active = TRUE AND ( sa.visibility = 'public' OR (sa.visibility = 'followers' AND EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND following_id = sa.user_id )) ) ORDER BY sa.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

, FALSE AS is_liked_by_me FROM social_activities sa JOIN users u ON u.id = sa.user_id LEFT JOIN user_social_profiles sp ON sp.user_id = sa.user_id WHERE sa.is_active = TRUE AND sa.visibility = 'public' ORDER BY sa.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM social_activities sa WHERE sa.user_id IN (SELECT following_id FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) AND sa.is_active = TRUE AND sa.visibility = 'public'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_likes (activity_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM activity_likes WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity_likes WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE social_activities SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE social_activities SET like_count = GREATEST(0, like_count - 1) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_comments (activity_id, user_id, parent_id, content, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, FALSE, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE activity_comments SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE activity_comments SET is_deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ac.id, ac.activity_id, ac.user_id, u.username, u.profile_picture_url AS user_photo, ac.parent_id, ac.content, ac.created_at, ac.updated_at, (ac.user_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) AS is_owner FROM activity_comments ac JOIN users u ON u.id = ac.user_id WHERE ac.activity_id = #{activityId} AND ac.parent_id IS NULL AND ac.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY ac.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE social_activities SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE social_activities SET comment_count = GREATEST(0, comment_count - 1) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM social_activities WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = TRUE
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) FROM social_activities WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = TRUE
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(comment_count), 0) FROM social_activities WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = TRUE
